title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 26, 2023
summary: January 26, 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a lower rate than last week, of 1.39% , from the level on 01/19/2023 of 13.543 M km 2 to 13.734 M km 2 for this week. title: Adventures and Aurora
summary: Borealis Basecamp launches new offerings Three nights deep in the backcountry of the million-acre White Mountains National Recreation Area outside Fairbanks is a good example of a hard adventure.
